# Quick Fix: sort_constructors_first lint in _ScanOverlayPainter
Generated: 2026-02-19

## Change Made
- File: `lib/features/attendance/presentation/widgets/qr_scan_overlay.dart`
- Line(s): 48-51
- Change: Moved `_ScanOverlayPainter` constructor before the `scanRect` field declaration to satisfy the `sort_constructors_first` lint rule.

## Before
```dart
class _ScanOverlayPainter extends CustomPainter {
  final Rect scanRect;

  _ScanOverlayPainter({required this.scanRect});
```

## After
```dart
class _ScanOverlayPainter extends CustomPainter {
  _ScanOverlayPainter({required this.scanRect});

  final Rect scanRect;
```

## Verification
- Syntax check: PASS (no logic changed, only declaration order)
- Pattern followed: `sort_constructors_first` — constructor before fields

## Files Modified
1. `lib/features/attendance/presentation/widgets/qr_scan_overlay.dart` - reordered constructor and field in `_ScanOverlayPainter`

## Notes
No functional change. This is a pure ordering fix for the Dart lint rule.
